title: Silan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Silan.jpg]] |name=Silan |designation= |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Arorua]] |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|A silan? I thought they were just mythical creatures like barracles or glooths.''"
"''They exist...|[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|{{Tales|1|Life, Death, and the Living Force}}}} A '''silan''' was a monstrous, tentacled creature from [[Arorua]]. They resembled a mass of writhing tendrils and multiple [[Tooth/Legends|toothy]] maws, quite similar to a [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]]. The silan lived in a towering earthen structure, with animal skulls strewn about the dank and gloomy vicinity as trophies or offerings from locals. Silans were primordial creatures immersed in the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] killed one of the creatures in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], directed by the [[Living Force/Legends|Living Force]]. After destroying it, Kenobi questioned whether what they did was right, wondering if even a creature like that had a place in the natural order, meaning it should be respected. Jinn expressed that he also found the experience unpleasant but felt directed by the Force to do so. He advised his Padawan that the ways of the Force were mysterious and the path of the Jedi was not an easy one, for they always had to be ready to serve something greater than themselves. {{Creature-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{Tales|1|Life, Death, and the Living Force}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]'' {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |pl=Silan }} [[Category:Creatures of Arorua]] [[Category:Force-sensitive creatures]] [[Category:Invertebrates]] [[Category:Mythological creatures]] [[Category:Predatory creatures]] [[Category:Sithspawn]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]] [[Category:Subterranean creatures]]
